title: Review
subtitle: Pick an audit — progress card + summary artifact
footer: Findings come back as a scorecard. Each finding has a one-click 'fork to fix' chip.

choices.label: Review current branch
choices.description: Diff vs main — PR-quality summary before you open a PR.

choices.label: Security audit
choices.description: OWASP Top 10 + secrets + dependency audit. Severity-rated report.

choices.label: Performance
choices.description: Hot-path scan, bundle size, N+1 queries, flame-graph pointers.

choices.label: Full project x-ray
choices.description: Health scorecard across code, docs, tests, deps, CI.
